summary: Iteration 7 testing complete - All 3 requested features are working correctly: 1) Contract Statistics Summary Cards showing Total Contracts (1), Total Revenue (43,000 SAR), Most Recent Contract (شركة التقنية المتقدمة), 2) Sticky footer for form navigation buttons with data-testid attributes, 3) Templates page Edit functionality for both packages and proposal templates with working PUT endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Contract statistics cards correctly filter proposals with status='agreement_signed' and calculate totals
Statistics cards use proper gradient backgrounds (green/blue/purple) with good contrast
Sticky footer implemented with fixed positioning (bottom: 0, z-index: 50) ensuring always visible navigation
Form navigation buttons have proper data-testid attributes: form-prev-button, form-next-button, form-save-draft-button
Templates page has Edit buttons (blue) alongside Delete buttons (red) for both packages and proposal templates
PUT /api/templates/packages/{id} and PUT /api/templates/proposals/{id} endpoints working correctly with auth
Edit forms properly populate existing data from database when editing
Arabic RTL layout handled correctly throughout all new features

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - Used existing signed contract for statistics testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features implemented and tested: 1) Contracts page now shows 3 statistics cards at top (Total Contracts, Total Revenue, Most Recent Contract), 2) ApplicationForm has sticky footer with navigation buttons always visible at bottom, 3) TemplatesPage allows editing packages and proposal templates via Edit button (blue) next to Delete button (red). Backend PUT endpoints for /api/templates/packages/{id} and /api/templates/proposals/{id} are working. Existing contract data: 1 signed contract for 'شركة التقنية المتقدمة' with 43,000 SAR.

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
